## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 126, Safari 17.4]
- App version / commit SHA: [e.g. v0.1.0, abc1234]
- Account tier: [Free / Pro / Business]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here, e.g. console errors, network traces, RGPD/DSA relevance.
